items.final_wording: Supports symptom history, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, clinical context, and ambulatory ECG review for syncope or palpitations without concluding causation.

source.title: 2017 ISHNE-HRS expert consensus statement on ambulatory ECG and external cardiac monitoring/telemetry
source.population: Adults and selected paediatric patients requiring ambulatory ECG or external cardiac monitoring for symptom-rhythm correlation or defined clinical indications.
source.setting: Outpatient and ambulatory rhythm evaluation, monitor selection, recording, analysis, and clinician result review.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting symptoms, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, monitor type and duration context, recording quality, and clinician review of Holter or ambulatory ECG data. It is old and does not generate a rhythm diagnosis, monitor order, treatment, or referral.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports symptom history, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, clinical context, and ambulatory ECG review for syncope or palpitations without concluding causation.

items.final_wording: Supports symptom history, event frequency, symptom-rhythm correlation, clinical context, and ambulatory ECG review for syncope or palpitations without concluding causation.

items.rationale: The HRS consensus supports symptom frequency, event context, symptom-rhythm correlation, and clinician review of ambulatory ECG data; it does not establish that symptoms are caused by premature ventricular complexes.
